类 DocBuildHelper

java.lang.Object
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.helper.DocBuildHelper
public class DocBuildHelper extends Object
Git Dependency Tree Helper

  • 方法详细资料

    • create

      public static DocBuildHelper create(ProjectDocConfigBuilder configBuilder)
      Create a new DocBuildHelper object
      参数:
      configBuilder - ProjectDocConfigBuilder
      返回:
      DocBuildHelper

    • getDependencyTree

      public DependencyTree getDependencyTree()
      Read the dependency-tree-file from baseDir
      返回:
      DependencyTree instance

    • getChangedFilesFromVCS

      public Set<FileDiff> getChangedFilesFromVCS(Predicate<String> isEntryPoint)
      Find and gather classes and their dependencies.

      When a class is modified within the git tree, and it is part of an endpoint argument or return value, this method will also include the classes containing these endpoints classes.

      If all modified classes are not part of the API dependency tree (e.g., they are services or mappers), this method will return an empty collection, as they do not impact the API documentation.

      参数:
      isEntryPoint - the entry point predicate
      返回:
      the set of changed files

    • rebuildDependencyTree

      public <T extends IDoc> void rebuildDependencyTree(List<T> apiList)
      Rebuilds the dependency tree.
      类型参数:
      T - the type parameter representing the kind of document, which must extend the IDoc interface
      参数:
      apiList - a list of documents that implement the IDoc interface

    • notGitRepo

      public boolean notGitRepo()
      Determines if the current project is not a Git repository.
      返回:
      true if the current project is not a Git repository, false otherwise.
